code: const SERVER_HOST="72.61.94.45";const API_PORT="8100";const computeDefaultApiBase=()=>{if(typeof window==="undefined"){return"/api";}const{hostname,port,protocol}=window.location;const isDevServer=port==="3000";const isLocalHost=hostname==="localhost"||hostname==="127.0.0.1";if(isDevServer||isLocalHost){const apiHost=hostname==="localhost"?"127.0.0.1":hostname;return"".concat(protocol,"//").concat(apiHost,":").concat(API_PORT);}if(hostname===SERVER_HOST){return"http://".concat(SERVER_HOST,":").concat(API_PORT);}return"/api";};export const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||computeDefaultApiBase();
